description_long: This house features a steeply pitched A-frame roof with a green metal finish, giving it a distinctive triangular silhouette. The upper portion of the facade is clad in horizontal wooden siding, while the lower section is finished in white plaster or stucco with a red brick base. Multiple rectangular windows are arranged asymmetrically on all sides, with some featuring black shutters. A side extension with a lower, matching green metal roof and large windows suggests a sunroom or enclosed porch. The overall design blends rustic and modern elements, making it suitable for suburban or semi-urban neighborhoods.
description: A steep A-frame house with a green metal roof, wood and white plaster exterior, and asymmetrical windows. Includes a side extension with large windows and a red brick base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall A-frame roof, wood siding, two upper windows, and a lower section with a window and black shutters.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlights the green metal roof, central ridge, and the side extension with a windowed roof section.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the triangular A-frame, wood siding, two upper windows, and a plain lower white wall.
description_view_3: Angled top view reveals the side extension with large windows and the main house's roof structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed under the side extension, featuring a simple door and a small covered porch area.
